Misuse of hooks, handle, and static.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"embed"
	"net/http"
)

//fabrik:http:notfound
func NF1(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:notfound
func NF2(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:methodnotallowed
func BadSig() {}

//fabrik:http:handle /x
func BadHandle(s string) {}

//fabrik:http:static /assets
var notEmbed int

//fabrik:http:static /files
//
//go:embed web.go
var hidden embed.FS

//fabrik:http:static assets
//
//go:embed web.go
var Assets2 embed.FS
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:11:1: duplicate //fabrik:http:notfound
  help: first declared at $WORK/web/web.go:8:1
error: web/web.go:14:1: handler BadSig has the wrong signature
  help: want func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
error: web/web.go:17:1: handler BadHandle has the wrong signature
  help: want func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request), or func() http.Handler
error: web/web.go:20:1: //fabrik:http:static must be on an embed.FS variable (notEmbed is int)
  help: declare it with //go:embed as: var Assets embed.FS
error: web/web.go:23:1: embed.FS variable hidden is unexported
  help: fabrik wires from package main; export the variable
error: web/web.go:28:22: static prefix must be a non-root path starting with "/" (got "assets")
  help: example: //fabrik:http:static /assets
